title: BTA Tiny Chunk Loader
description: A chunk loader for my dear BTA
body: # BTA Tiny ChunkLoader *Use the ancient power of the motion to create powerful tiny 3x3 chunk loader.* Work both in Single Player and Multiplayer. ***Fully configurable now !*** *Is also compatible as a turtle version for BTA CC* Requirements: - BTA (https://www.betterthanadventure.net) - Babric for BTA https://github.com/Turnip-Labs/babric-instance-repo/releases/tag/v7.3_04 - HalpLibe (https://github.com/Turnip-Labs/bta-halplibe) ***Thanks so much to @MartinSVK12 for fixing this mod for Single Player***
